name: AWS Cost Optimizer
tagline: EC2 rightsizing & cost analysis with 18-page Streamlit dashboard
description: AWS EC2 and resource cost analysis tool with interactive Streamlit dashboard, rightsizing recommendations with confidence scores, cost anomaly detection, and multi-account AWS Organizations support.
features: Specialized modules: RDS, EBS, Lambda, ElastiCache, S3, Graviton

name: Polymarket Trading Bot
tagline: AI-powered prediction market bot with LLM probability estimation & Kelly sizing
description: 24/7 prediction market trading bot for Polymarket with multi-strategy execution (edge-based, market-making, arbitrage). LLM ensemble forecasting with Claude + GPT-4, Kelly-based position sizing, and TypeScript bridge for wallet authentication and order execution.
features: LLM probability estimation (Claude/GPT-4 ensemble with Brier-weighted scoring)
Kelly criterion position sizing with category exposure caps
WebSocket real-time price streaming with REST fallback
TypeScript bridge for Polymarket wallet auth & CLOB execution
SQLite market cache & trade persistence (90-day retention)
24/7 paper trading wrapper with auto-restart & health checks
Telegram alerts (entries, exits, hourly heartbeat, daily summary)

name: PromptIQ
tagline: Chrome extension that scores & rewrites AI prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot & Perplexity
description: Browser extension that evaluates prompts across 6 dimensions (clarity, specificity, context, structure, constraints, role), rewrites them with topic-aware optimization, and formats output for each AI model's strengths.
features: Multi-dimensional prompt scoring engine (6 dimensions, weighted 1-10)
Topic-aware rewriting (code, writing, business, analysis, creative)
Model-specific formatting (Claude XML, ChatGPT markdown, Gemini concise, Copilot technical, Perplexity search)
Site adapters for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity
Learning system tracking prompt effectiveness (200 records)

name: Invoice SaaS Starter
tagline: Full-stack invoice automation with Stripe payments & recurring billing
description: Invoice automation SaaS platform built with Next.js 14. Create, send, and track invoices with Stripe payments, automated emails, recurring invoices, PDF export, and analytics dashboard.
features: Full invoice CRUD with status tracking

name: Wholesale CRM
tagline: Real estate wholesaling CRM with programmatic lead distress scoring & deal pipeline
description: Real estate wholesaling CRM with programmatic lead scoring based on 11 distress signals, deal pipeline with state machine validation, smart buyer matching, and Telegram notifications for high-priority leads.
features: Distress scoring engine (11 YAML-configured signals, weighted 0-100)
Bulk CSV/JSON lead import with auto-dedup and smart column mapping
Deal pipeline with validated state machines (8 lead states, 7 deal states)
Smart buyer matching by market, price range, property type & rehab appetite
MAO calculation (70% rule) with assignment fee tracking
Multi-level reporting (pipeline funnel, daily activity, score distribution)
Telegram alerts for high-priority leads and deal status changes
Click-based CLI with 15+ commands across 4 command groups

name: DealScope
tagline: Commercial real estate analysis platform with financial modeling
description: Commercial real estate property analysis platform for investors. TypeScript monorepo with Expo (mobile), Next.js (web), AWS Lambda backend, DynamoDB, and Stripe payments.
features: 5-year cash flow projections with equity tracking

name: Healthcare PA SaaS
tagline: Prior Authorization automation for specialty practices — market validated
description: Market research for a Prior Authorization automation SaaS targeting small-to-mid specialty practices (5-50 physicians). No AI-native product exists for this segment. $2.5-2.8B market today, projected $5.8-8.2B by 2033.
